name: search_content
description: Search Mastodon for statuses, accounts, or hashtags matching a query string. Returns categorized results with full object details for each match type.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter results by type. One of: accounts, hashtags, statuses. Omit to search all types.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results per category (default 20, max 40).

parameters.name: resolve
parameters.description: Attempt to resolve remote accounts if the query is a URI or WebFinger address.

parameters.name: following
parameters.description: Only return results from accounts you follow.

statuses.content: Just published a new article about machine learning fundamentals.
